arabicText: وَتَجِبُ النِّيَّةُ فِي الْوُضُوءِ وَالْغُسْلِ لِتَصِحَّ الصَّلَاةُ بَعْدَهَا
latinTransliteration: Wa tajibun-niyyatu fil-wuḍū'i wal-ghusli li-taṣiḥḥaṣ-ṣalātu ba‘dahā
englishTranslation: And intention is obligatory in ablution and bathing for the prayer to be valid thereafter.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yéene dafa war ci waza ak ca janaba ngir sa julit mën a sell.
wolofalAjamiScript: يِينِ دَفَ وَرْ سِ وَزَ اَكْ سِ جَنَبَ نْجِرْ سَ جُلِتْ مِٜnْ اَ سِلْ

arabicText: وَشُرُوطُ وُجُوبِهَا الْإِسْلَامُ وَالْعَقْلُ وَالْبُلُوغُ كَمَا فِصِّلَ
latinTransliteration: Wa shurūṭu wujūbihāl-islāmu wal-‘aqlu wal-bulūghu kamā fuṣṣil
englishTranslation: And the conditions for its obligation are Islam, sanity, and puberty, as detailed.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te waru julit moy nekk jullit, am xel, ak mag niki firi nañ ko.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُ جُلِتْ مُيْ نِكَّ جُلِّتْ اَمْ خَلْ اَكْ مَجْ نِكِ فِرِ نَنْجُ كُ

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ النَّجَاسَةِ فِي الثِّيَابِ وَالْبَدَنِ وَالْمَكَانِ تَمَاماً
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minan-najāsati fīth-thiyābi wal-badani wal-makāni tamāmā
englishTranslation: And beware of impurity in garments, body, and place completely.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga fexee bañ a taq ci sobbe ci yére, jëmm, walla bërëb.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ فِخِ بَنْيْ اَ تَقْ سِ صُبِّ سِ يِيرِ جِمْ وَلَّ بِرِٜbْ

arabicText: فَالْفِقْهُ نُورٌ يُسْتَضَاءُ بِهِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ مِنَ الْأُمُورِ
latinTransliteration: Fal-fiqhu nūrun yustāḍā'u bihi fī kulli amrin minal-umūr
englishTranslation: For jurisprudence is a light by which one is guided in every single affair.
wolofTranslationStandard: Xam-xam bi leer la buy sotti ci bépp mbir gu nit di doon sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: خَمْ خَمْ بِ لِيرْ لَ بُيْ سُتِّ سِ بِيقْ مْبِرْ جُ نِتْ دِ دُونْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: وَتَجِبُ النِّيَّةُ فِي الْوُضُوءِ وَالْغُسْلِ لِتَصِحَّ الصَّلَاةُ بَعْدَهَا [5]
latinTransliteration: Wa tajibun-niyyatu fil-wuḍū'i wal-ghusli li-taṣiḥḥaṣ-ṣalātu ba‘dahā (5)
englishTranslation: And intention is obligatory in ablution and bathing for the prayer to be valid thereafter. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yéene dafa war ci waza ak ca janaba ngir sa julit mën a sell. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: يِينِ دَفَ وَرْ سِ وَزَ اَكْ سِ جَنَبَ نْجِرْ سَ جُلِتْ مِٜnْ اَ سِلْ [5]

arabicText: وَشُرُوطُ وُجُوبِهَا الْإِسْلَامُ وَالْعَقْلُ وَالْبُلُوغُ كَمَا فِصِّلَ [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa shurūṭu wujūbihāl-islāmu wal-‘aqlu wal-bulūghu kamā fuṣṣil (6)
englishTranslation: And the conditions for its obligation are Islam, sanity, and puberty, as detailed. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te waru julit moy nekk jullit, am xel, ak mag niki firi nañ ko. (Wers 6)

arabicText: فَالْفِقْهُ نُورٌ يُسْتَضَاءُ بِهِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ مِنَ الْأُمُورِ [28]
latinTransliteration: Fal-fiqhu nūrun yustāḍā'u bihi fī kulli amrin minal-umūr (28)
englishTranslation: For jurisprudence is a light by which one is guided in every single affair. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Xam-xam bi leer la buy sotti ci bépp mbir gu nit di doon sa sùnek. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: خَمْ خَمْ بِ لِيرْ لَ بُيْ سُتِّ سِ بِيقْ مْبِرْ جُ نِتْ دِ دُونْ سَ سُنِكْ [28]

arabicText: وَتَجِبُ النِّيَّةُ فِي الْوُضُوءِ وَالْغُسْلِ لِتَصِحَّ الصَّلَاةُ بَعْدَهَا [29]
latinTransliteration: Wa tajibun-niyyatu fil-wuḍū'i wal-ghusli li-taṣiḥḥaṣ-ṣalātu ba‘dahā (29)
englishTranslation: And intention is obligatory in ablution and bathing for the prayer to be valid thereafter. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yéene dafa war ci waza ak ca janaba ngir sa julit mën a sell. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: يِينِ دَفَ وَرْ سِ وَزَ اَكْ سِ جَنَبَ نْجِرْ سَ جُلِتْ مِٜnْ اَ سِلْ [29]

arabicText: وَشُرُوطُ وُجُوبِهَا الْإِسْلَامُ وَالْعَقْلُ وَالْبُلُوغُ كَمَا فِصِّلَ [30]
latinTransliteration: Wa shurūṭu wujūbihāl-islāmu wal-‘aqlu wal-bulūghu kamā fuṣṣil (30)
englishTranslation: And the conditions for its obligation are Islam, sanity, and puberty, as detailed. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te waru julit moy nekk jullit, am xel, ak mag niki firi nañ ko. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُ جُلِتْ مُيْ نِكَّ جُلِّتْ اَمْ خَلْ اَكْ مَجْ نِكِ فِرِ نَنْجُ كُ [30]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ النَّجَاسَةِ فِي الثِّيَابِ وَالْبَدَنِ وَالْمَكَانِ تَمَاماً [31]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minan-najāsati fīth-thiyābi wal-badani wal-makāni tamāmā (31)
englishTranslation: And beware of impurity in garments, body, and place completely. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga fexee bañ a taq ci sobbe ci yére, jëmm, walla bërëb. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ فِخِ بَنْيْ اَ تَقْ سِ صُبِّ سِ يِيرِ جِمْ وَلَّ بِرِٜbْ [31]

arabicText: فَالْفِقْهُ نُورٌ يُسْتَضَاءُ بِهِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ مِنَ الْأُمُورِ [32]
latinTransliteration: Fal-fiqhu nūrun yustāḍā'u bihi fī kulli amrin minal-umūr (32)
englishTranslation: For jurisprudence is a light by which one is guided in every single affair. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Xam-xam bi leer la buy sotti ci bépp mbir gu nit di doon sa sùnek. (Wers 32)

latinTransliteration: Wa tajibun-niyyatu fil-wuḍū'i wal-ghusli li-taṣiḥḥaṣ-ṣalātu ba‘dahā (33)
englishTranslation: And intention is obligatory in ablution and bathing for the prayer to be valid thereafter. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yéene dafa war ci waza ak ca janaba ngir sa julit mën a sell. (Wers 33)

latinTransliteration: Wa shurūṭu wujūbihāl-islāmu wal-‘aqlu wal-bulūghu kamā fuṣṣil (34)
